title: Calling & Purpose
name: Calling & Purpose
description: Words connected to divine calling, assignment, direction, and destiny.
summary: Words connected to divine calling, assignment, direction, and destiny.
prayer_framework: Father, make me chosen, called, and sent into divine purpose.
declaration: I am chosen, called, and sent into divine purpose.
divine_assignment: Pray through Benor -> Arion -> Luma -> Taviel and journal one reflection connected to Calling & Purpose.
calling_connection: Supports calling & purpose through Benor, Arion, Taviel, Hineni, Shaliah, Malkiel.
animation_prompt: A Promise Cluster scene for Calling & Purpose: Benor, Arion, Taviel, Hineni, Shaliah, Malkiel appear as connected lights around Romans 8:28-30.
book_entry_template: Today I prayed the Calling & Purpose cluster: I am chosen, called, and sent into divine purpose.
